intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Bigfoot, Vern! Right in my backyard! Eight feet tall!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Yeah! He was going through my trash cans!

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: That's called a bear. Or a homeless guy.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: *laughing* Okay fine, it was my buddy in a gorilla suit.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Sasquatch! In my yard! Last night!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Uh, downtown? But it was definitely Bigfoot!

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern, I saw Bigfoot behind the 7-Eleven last Tuesday.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Behind the convenience store. Doing what exactly?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Just... standing there. Looked right at me. Then walked off.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: *snorts* Okay you got me. Great show, Vern.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Hundred percent, Vern. Bigfoot. My neighbor's property.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Big, hairy, walking on two legs. Made eye contact with me.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Nah, I'm just yanking your chain. Keep up the good work!

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: YES! Huge! Hairy! Right outside my window!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Last night! It roared at me and ran off into the trees!

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: We need to get a team out there!

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: *dying laughing* I'm so sorry, I made it all up!
